audit_result.proof_trace: ValidateHashes uses mismatched loop bounds: first loop iterates blobVersionedHashes.Length (hash format check), second loop iterates blobs.Blobs.Length (commitment validation). No length equality assertion between arrays. If lengths differ, either array access throws or extra hashes bypass commitment validation.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker sends blob tx with more BlobVersionedHashes than wrapper.Blobs. Extra hashes pass format check in first loop but skip commitment validation in second loop, breaking integrity guarantee that every hash commits to an actual blob.

PROP-5a6a79d5-inv-059.text: tx.BlobVersionedHashes length must equal wrapper Blobs/Commitments/Proofs length.
PROP-5a6a79d5-inv-059.assertion: forall blob_tx: len(tx.BlobVersionedHashes) == len(wrapper.Blobs) == len(wrapper.Commitments) == len(wrapper.Proofs)
